behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all files (MessagePortChannel.cpp, JSAbortController.cpp, BroadcastChannel.cpp, EventListenerMap.cpp/.h), relevant functions (postMessageToRemote, visitChildrenImpl, mutator methods), and specifies the required patterns (closed-state check, signal().reason().visit, smart pointer map, thread affinity helper, mayBeGCThread).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and general approach (e.g., 'thread-safe weak pointer template wrapper', 'signal().reason().visit(visitor)') but doesn't provide line-by-line replacements; agent must still produce actual code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use flexible regex patterns accepting multiple names (m_isClosed|isClosed|closed|m_closed|_closed), multiple smart pointer types (ThreadSafeWeakPtr|WeakPtr|weak_ptr), and various thread-check helper names.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests are static source analysis using git diff and regex inspection of file contents (e.g., test_message_port_closed_guard uses _git_diff and regex on source); no execution or behavior testing since compilation is infeasible per comment in test file.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify specific structural properties like guard appearing before m_pendingMessages.append, map value type not being a raw pointer, and 4/5 mutators having thread checks — a stub would not satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the four documented bugs has corresponding test functions covering the described fix patterns.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named by bug area (test_message_port_*, test_abort_signal_*, test_broadcast_channel_*, test_event_listener_map_*) with docstrings mapping to checks.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a C++ code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and function names match the repo layout (src/bun.js/bindings/webcore/...).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files and function names are named but this is appropriate given the bugs span multiple files; no line numbers are given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no agentmd config edits.
